note: Permit2 mainnet surface triage. Permission grant/revoke functions are COVER. Direct AllowanceTransfer transferFrom execution is covered as user-visible fund movement. SignatureTransfer typed-data signatures and relayer execution are both modeled: sign-time as token.permit2_sign_transfer, execution-time as token.permit2_transfer_from.

0x87517c45.name: approve
0x87517c45.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: sets Permit2 allowance for token/spender/amount/expiration

0x65d9723c.name: invalidateNonces
0x65d9723c.reason: PERMISSION REVOCATION primitive: invalidates ordered allowance nonces for a token/spender pair

0x3ff9dcb1.name: invalidateUnorderedNonces
0x3ff9dcb1.reason: PERMISSION/ORDER REVOCATION primitive: invalidates Permit2 unordered nonce bits; used by UniswapX order cancellation

0xcc53287f.name: lockdown
0xcc53287f.reason: PERMISSION REVOCATION primitive: batch revokes Permit2 token/spender approvals

0x2a2d80d1.name: permit
0x2a2d80d1.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: relayed PermitBatch allowance signature submission

0x2b67b570.name: permit
0x2b67b570.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive: relayed PermitSingle allowance signature submission

0x30f28b7a.name: permitTransferFrom
0x30f28b7a.reason: SignatureTransfer single execution; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitTransferFrom emits owner-aware token.permit2_transfer_from

0xedd9444b.name: permitTransferFrom
0xedd9444b.reason: SignatureTransfer batch execution; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitTransferFromBatch emits per-item owner-aware token.permit2_transfer_from

0x137c29fe.name: permitWitnessTransferFrom
0x137c29fe.reason: SignatureTransfer witness execution; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitWitnessTransferFrom emits owner-aware token.permit2_transfer_from

0xfe8ec1a7.name: permitWitnessTransferFrom
0xfe8ec1a7.reason: SignatureTransfer witness batch execution; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitWitnessTransferFromBatch emits per-item owner-aware token.permit2_transfer_from

0x36c78516.name: transferFrom
0x36c78516.reason: AllowanceTransfer direct fund movement: surfaces moved token, recipient, and amount

0x0d58b1db.name: transferFrom
0x0d58b1db.reason: AllowanceTransfer direct batch fund movement: surfaces each moved token, recipient, and amount

PermitSingle.reason: off-chain Permit2 allowance signature; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitSingle

PermitBatch.reason: off-chain Permit2 batch allowance signature; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitBatch

PermitTransferFrom.reason: off-chain Permit2 SignatureTransfer single signature; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitTransferFrom-sign

PermitBatchTransferFrom.reason: off-chain Permit2 SignatureTransfer batch signature; manifest uniswap/permit2/permitBatchTransferFrom-sign

PermitWitnessTransferFrom.reason: off-chain Permit2 witness signature used by UniswapX intent orders; manifests under uniswapx/*/sign
